title: Cheats+
description: This is an datapack where you can craft the impossibles.
body:
![Cheats+ 1.1](https://i.imgur.com/zLFIDPz.png)

📖 Cheats+ Datapack

---


Cheats+ is a datapack/mod that unlocks the impossible side of Minecraft by adding custom crafting recipes for normally unobtainable items. It’s perfect for players who enjoy experimenting, playing in hardcore, or just want to bend the rules without typing commands.

✨ Features

 ---

Craft impossible items like:

End Portal Frames

Totem Of Undying

Enchanted Golden Apple

Recipes for rare items such as:

Elytra

Mace

Nether Star

End Crystal

Name Tag

Diamond

Ender Chest

Player Head

Dragon Head

Zombie Head

Piglin Head

Skeleton Skull

Wither Skull

Creeper Head

Prismarine Shard

Trident

---

Designed for players who want a “cheats in survival/hardcore” experience.

🎮 Why use Cheats+?

Great for hardcore players who don’t want to risk commands.

Perfect for experimenting in survival without switching to Creative.

Adds a fun, overpowered twist to regular gameplay.

Progress ⌛
